markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on a new strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Rebounding:** Clicks are up \~20% WoW, with "closed-loop AI in manufacturing" now the top performer, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [**New Strategic Focus:** Content will now support two new campaigns: "Self-Modeling" (a new platform feature) and "Thought Leadership" (on the "Define" & "Explore" concepts).](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Content Repurposing:** Tara requested top-performing articles to be repurposed into lead-gen assets (e.g., whitepapers) for these campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**New Content Ideas:** "Data readiness," "hot spots in kilns" (a costly cement issue), and "SAG mills" were proposed as high-value topics.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Performance:** Clicks are up \~20% WoW, outperforming competitors like Aspen Tech and Aviva.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [**Top Performers (November):**](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - "Closed-loop AI in manufacturing" (new \#1)
      - ["Industrial AI" series (Oil & Gas, Chemical)](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
      - ["Process safety management"](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
      - ["Sustainability"](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - "Applications of reinforcement learning" (\#5)
  - [**Content Trade-off:** Balancing high-volume keywords (e.g., "reinforcement learning") with highly-targeted, low-volume ones (e.g., "ball mill optimization").](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The optimal mix depends on the quality of organic leads, which is currently unknown.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**New Content Ideas:**](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [**"Data readiness"** (from an ARC presentation)](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [**"Hot spots in kilns"** (cement manufacturing)](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Prevents costly downtime (\~1 week, $100k–$1M) from kiln degradation.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [**"SAG mills"** (mining)](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
          - [**Rationale:** A natural follow-up to the successful "ball mill" topic.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### New Strategic Campaigns

  - [**Goal:** Build a content foundation for the Q1 product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [**Campaign 1: Self-Modeling**](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [**Focus:** A new platform feature enabling users to create their own models without a data scientist.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Status:** Soft-launching at ERTC next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Campaign 2: Thought Leadership**](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**Focus:** Two new product concepts, "Define" and "Explore," which productize existing capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**"Define":** Creating a "coordinated operating strategy" to align siloed functions (e.g., planning, operations) and prevent optimizing against each other.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [**"Explore":** Analyzing variable interactions ("handles") to understand trade-offs.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [Deliver a list of top-performing articles by tomorrow (Nov 14) for Tara's campaign planning.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
          - [Top 5 per vertical](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
          - [Overall Top 10](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
          - [Include topic pillar context](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [Send an AI summary of this meeting for confirmation.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**Tara:**](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Provide two new articles for publication:](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
          - [One from a team member (full rights secured).](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
          - [A new thought leadership piece on change management.](https://fathom.video/share/ckFKdikfyyTyuHzHQV2gCS66SmJEyyPn?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
